reviews.review_msg: Professor Carlos has been one of the most supportive professors I've had in SFU Beedie. He really does care for his students. He will help you with anything and I wish I had more business professors like him. Note - He does make you work for it, so the workload is demanding. Do not leave the final project last minute - but you will learn a lot.

The workload in Carlos' class is heavy but interesting. A great lecturer with incredible passion. He possesses the kind of teaching magic that gets you into the world of finance and evokes your interest in the subject matter. Really helpful professor! Clear instructions. The deliverables are heavy, but he's a fair grader.

Great professor, but considering it was a 400 class, his participation marks will kill your grade if you aren't there 95% of the time. But he's a great guy with a sense of humor. Class is interactive full of discussions to make you think and apply the discussed material. I learned a lot in Carlos' class!

This class with with Dr. Da Costa was demanding but good. I took two courses with him this semester so I can graduate this spring. He made the expectations and assignments clear. The group assignments took a good amount of time. He was easy to contact when needed. He cares about the students and notices the time put we put in.

Prof Carlos cares a lot about his students, and would do anything to accommodate and help anyone. I thought his lectures were super dry though, but it couldve better in person - what a shame I had to do it online. Exams were pretty easy and group project is fair so the curve was very competitive. I still recommend taking it with him though!

I was never bored in this class, and learned so much. He tells stories to help you remember concepts, lets you out early if he completes everything earlier than planned. I didn't miss class and studied a lot, but never felt he was unfair. Lots of reading. The project isn't bad.

Professor Carlos was a big influence on me in BUS 864 that I just took with him. He will bend over backwards to help you if you ask for help. Highly recommended. A lot of information, study and attend classes. Carlos actually cares about his students succeeding. The assignment is interesting and good, and the tests are OK.

Professor Carlos was a big influence on me in BUS 825 and BUS 864 that I just took with him. He will bend over backwards to help you if you ask for help. Highly recommended. A lot of information, study and attend classes. He actually cares about his students succeeding. The assignment is interesting and good, and the tests are OK.

You won't learn anything in the class. A big waste of time. Andrey Pavolv should have taught this course. No programming in the course which is very annoying and credit modelling is important thing to learn to, you can learn on your own. You don't need him at all. Talk big deliver less!

A very inspiring professor, Carlos is detailed and helpful. He uses real life examples and he has a passion for what he talks about. If you go to lecture and pay attention then you would understand everything in the course. He covers a fair bit of material. The course is interesting and intellectual stimulating. A fair marker.
